title: Veld Project Configuration
description: Configuration file for a Veld local development environment. Place this as veld.json in your project root.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor autocompletion.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Must be "1" for this version of Veld.

name.description: Human-readable project name. Used in URLs and registry entries.

url_template.description: URL template for services. Supports placeholders: {service}, {variant}, {run}, {project}, {branch}, {worktree}, {username}, {hostname}. Supports fallback operator: {branch ?? run}.

presets.description: Named shortcuts for node:variant selections. Each preset maps to an array of "node:variant" strings.

nodes.description: The dependency graph nodes. Each key is a node name, and the value defines its variants.

NodeConfig.description: Configuration for a single node in the dependency graph.

default_variant.description: The variant to use when none is specified. If omitted and the node has exactly one variant, that variant is used automatically.

url_template.description: URL template override for all variants of this node. Overrides the project-level url_template.

variants.description: Available variants for this node. Each key is a variant name.

VariantConfig.description: Configuration for a single variant of a node.

type.description: Step type. "bash" runs a command/script to completion. "start_server" starts a long-running process and waits for it to become healthy.

command.description: Inline shell command to execute. Supports Veld variable substitution (e.g. ${veld.port}, ${node.output}).

script.description: Path to a script file, relative to veld.json. Mutually exclusive with command.

health_check.description: Health check configuration. Required for start_server variants.

depends_on.description: Dependencies: maps node names to the variant that must be running before this variant starts.

env.description: Extra environment variables injected into the process.

outputs.description: Output declarations. For bash steps: an array of output names captured from VELD_OUTPUT. For start_server steps: an object mapping output names to template strings.

oneOf.description: Declared output names for bash steps.
Synthetic output templates for start_server steps.

sensitive_outputs.description: Output keys whose values are sensitive. These are masked in logs and encrypted at rest.

verify.description: Idempotency verification command. Only applies to "bash" type variants. If this command exits 0, the step is considered already complete and is skipped.

url_template.description: URL template override for this specific variant. Overrides both node-level and project-level url_template.

HealthCheck.description: Health check configuration for a start_server variant.

type.description: Health check strategy. "http" polls an HTTP endpoint. "port" checks if the port is accepting connections. "bash" runs a command and checks the exit code.

expect_status.description: Expected HTTP status code (type "http" only). Defaults to 200.

command.description: Shell command to run (type "bash" only). Exit code 0 means healthy.

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum seconds to wait for the service to become healthy.
